summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features for BidBlitz Penny-Auktion platform. All 22 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend testing verified all new pages and features work correctly. Fixed a critical bug in password change/reset functionality.

fixed.issue: Password field inconsistency - endpoints were updating 'hashed_password' field but login checks 'password' field
fixed.fix: Updated both endpoints to use 'password' field consistently with registration and login

features_tested: Password Reset Flow (3-step: email -> code -> new password)

pages_tested: Impressum (/impressum) - Legal info with company details, TMG reference
Datenschutz (/datenschutz) - GDPR info, cookies, Stripe payment info
AGB (/agb) - Terms with penny auction rules, bid packages, withdrawal rights
Profile (/profile) - Name/email edit, password change section
Admin Payments (/admin -> Zahlungen) - Revenue stats, transaction table
Admin Logs (/admin -> Systemlogs) - Activity logs (bids, auctions, users)
components_verified: Cookie Consent Banner - Shows on first visit, accept/decline/settings options
Footer - Contains links to Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Password field inconsistency in server.py - change-password and reset-password endpoints now use 'password' field consistently
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed password field in change-password (line 428-448) and reset-password (line 365-399) endpoints
/app/tests/test_new_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for new features

mocked_apis.email_sending: Password reset code is returned in API response (demo_code field) instead of being sent via email

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (legal pages, password reset, profile management, bid history, purchases, admin payments/logs) are working correctly. Password change/reset bug was fixed. Test file /app/tests/test_new_features.py contains 22 tests covering all new API endpoints.
